content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(expiry_skew30)
C: auth_mw ∧ expMs<nowMs⇒401 ∧ allow(skew30)
H: skew30_boundary_refresh_loop
P: expMs≥nowMs-30000 → allow
V: edge(-30s_200) ∧ edge(-31s_401)
R: ! refresh_loop
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(expiry_skew30).
Constraints: auth middleware and expMs<nowMs implies 401 and allow(30-second grace window).
Hypothesis: skew30_boundary_refresh_loop.
Plan: expMs≥nowMs-30000 then allow.
Verify: edge(-30s_200) and edge(-31s_401).
Risk: high-risk refresh_loop.
Answer target: min_fix and reg_test.
